concept: Formulate an action game where you control an urban graffiti artist whose spray-painted creations temporarily come to life and follow simple commands. Create tactical combinations of animated street art to navigate city environments, distract authorities, and access exclusive painting locations. Develop your signature style by collecting rare pigments and techniques from legendary street artists across different districts. Your artistic revolution gradually transforms the dystopian cityscape as your living masterpieces inspire citizens to reclaim public spaces from corporate control.
